title: Bifidobacterium longum ncimb 41676
abstract: Bifidobacterium longum strain NCIMB 41676 improves sleep.
claims:
Claims Claims 1. Bifidobacterium longum strain NCIMB 41676 for use in improving sleep in humans. 2. Bifidobacterium longum strain NCIMB 41676 for use as claimed in claim 1 wherein the strain is in the form of viable cells. 3. Bifidobacterium longum strain NCIMB 41676 for use as claimed in claim 1 wherein the strain is in the form of non- viable cells. 4. Bifidobacterium longum strain NCIMB 41676 for use as claimed in any of claims 1 to 3 wherein the strain is in a formulation which is suitable for oral administration or consumption by humans. 5. Bifidobacterium longum strain NCIMB 41676 for use as claimed in claim 4 wherein the formulation comprises a prebiotic. 6. Bifidobacterium longum strain NCIMB 41676 for use as claimed in claim 4 or 5 wherein the formulation further comprises an ingestable carrier. 7. Bifidobacterium longum strain NCIMB 41676 for use as claimed in claim 6 wherein the ingestable carrier is a pharmaceutically acceptable carrier such as a capsule, tablet or powder. 8. Bifidobacterium longum strain NCIMB 41676 for use as claimed in claim 6 wherein the ingestible carrier is a food product such as an acidified milk, a yoghurt, a frozen food such as frozen yoghurt or ice cream, a gum, a candy, a milk powder, a milk concentrate, a cheese spread, a nutritional composition, a nutritional supplement, a cereal bar, a dressing or a beverage. 9. Bifidobacterium longum strain NCIMB 41676 for use as claimed in any of claims 5 to 8 wherein the formulation is an infant food. 10. Bifidobacterium longum strain NCIMB 41676 for use as claimed in any of claims 5 to 9 wherein the formulation comprises a protein and/or peptide, in particular proteins and/or 

 peptides that are rich in glutamine/glutamate, a lipid, a carbohydrate, a vitamin, mineral and/or trace element. 11. Bifidobacterium longum strain NCIMB 41676 for use as claimed in any of claims 5 to 10 wherein the strain is present in the formulation in an amount of more than 10 6 cfu. 12. Bifidobacterium longum strain NCIMB 41676 for use as claimed in any of claims 5 to 11 wherein the strain is present in the formulation in an amount of from 10 7 to 1010 cfu. 13. Bifidobacterium longum strain NCIMB 41676 for use as claimed in any of claims 5 to 11 wherein the strain is present in the formulation in an amount of from 10 8 to 109 cfu. 14. Bifidobacterium longum strain NCIMB 41676 for use as claimed in any of claims 5 to 13 wherein the formulation comprises an adjuvant. 15. Bifidobacterium longum strain NCIMB 41676 for use as claimed in any of claims 5 to 14 wherein the formulation comprises a drug entity. 16. Bifidobacterium longum strain NCIMB 41676 for use as claimed in any of claims 5 to 15 wherein the formulation comprises a biological compound.
